name: live-session-analysis
description: Root package — delegates controller checks to frontend/ and backend/ subdirectories, mirroring Makefile targets

scripts.lint: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../backend && uv run --python 3.11 --with-requirements requirements.txt python -m py_compile app/main.py
scripts.test: cd frontend && npx vitest run && cd ../backend && uv run --python 3.11 --with-requirements requirements.txt pytest tests/ -q
